notes: Full Playwright suite of 300 scenarios across 4 test personas. The 30 scenarios listed above are representative; the full suite covers community pulse (9 tests), scoreboard (18 tests), garden visualization (21 tests), homepage accessibility (12 tests), decision.json validation (38 tests), day detail pages (6 tests), game smoke and mechanics (12 tests), garden stats (10 tests), and general site regression tests. All 300 passed on the post-retune build with startingResources: 60, resourcePerTick: 22, resourceTickMs: 3600, gardenHealth: 2.
